name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
We're sending our thoughts and prayers to our fellow Americans in
Florida and the other southern regions being impacted by
Hurricane Irma.

Peter, we're sending our
thoughts and prayers to our fellow Americans in Florida and the
other southern regions being impacted by Hurricane Irma.

As reported by the Associated
Press, the State of Ohio will be sending thousands of Ohio
National Guard soldiers to assist with disaster relief
operations.

Today is also 9/11 and it's so
very important that we all take a moment to pause and remember
the victims of those vicious terror attacks and honor the service
and sacrifice of the men and women who heroically ran into harms
way.

--
Gov. John Kasich was in
Washington, D.C. last Friday to join Colorado Gov. John
Hickenlooper and a bipartisan group of members of Congress in
supporting a fair health care fix for the American people.

Watch a clip from the press
conference (here):

Watch a panel discussion with
Govs. Kasich and Hickenlooper (here):

• Read the blueprint and
sign our petition to show your support at:
JohnKasich.com/FairHealthCareFix

• Read the op-ed authored by
Govs. Kasich and Hickenlooper: TIME: A Bipartisan Approach to
Stabilizing Our Nation's Health Insurance System

Gov. Kasich also spoke about the
recent DACA news on CBS This Morning:

• If you agree, please take
a moment to sign our petition to show your support:
JohnKasich.com/DACA

Gov. Kasich also joined Gov.
Arnold Schwarzenegger and Senators John McCain & Bob Dole in
signing an amicus brief calling on the U.S. Supreme Court to rule
against gerrymandering. Read their statement here:

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: The White House
subject: Never Forget
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9284b98545010e59e3b4a6b94757f99d9cb610209e3e16a54e4ae8dc46f668bf602de7137393b9136441dfb716fb226ff28553d95ba1b07

Today, we pay tribute to and remember the nearly 3,000 lives lost in the terror attacks on September 11, 2001. We mourn them, we honor them, and we pledge to never forget them.

-------------

Hurricane Irma Update

President Trump, Vice President Pence, and members of the Cabinet received a briefing yesterday from Acting Homeland Security Secretary Elaine Duke, Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) Administrator Brock Long, and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert on the ongoing Federal response and recovery operations for Hurricane Irma. They also discussed Federal support for Hurricane Harvey recovery, which is still in the early stages. President Trump stressed that his top priorities are life-saving and life-sustaining efforts in affected areas. The President is in regular contact with Governors currently in the path of Hurricane Irma, as well as Governors of the States and territories already impacted by the storm. He continues to extend his thoughts and prayers to those affected, while
recognizing the many volunteer and faith-based organizations dedicating their time and efforts to help their fellow Americans.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f9284b98545010e55d7b4e144cd8920bbc42c62813ba355ef6c7105415693bc22e1b57145208d3193372902aa955353b1ab0d4bdbcf5fedb
Read more

President Trump Approves Additional Disaster Declarations

Yesterday, President Trump amended the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8b6255968d70041b96fb6fdcf87755299b6bc03071cd8b943c5c883d2751a41407e637af2e4a3276e8def89e9ae344473
U.S. Virgin Islands Disaster Declaration and authorized an increase in the level of Federal funding for debris removal and emergency protective measures undertaken as a result of Hurricane Irma. The President also declared that a major disaster exists in the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8b7caf00f104c035fee6d96f02ffbbb3f8a0aae4b70dfb895ddc6c6f2940291357f4e63da706a0be5e210995f79bcb180
Commonwealth of Puerto Rico and the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8dc032a8dead1a49a3ad89d24809e1cab826425197da58423274ce50d7457e1d060858cf930ee2c3c634c7b3e31d2cf17
State of Florida, and ordered Federal aid to supplement recovery efforts.

FEMA Resources

Residents and business owners who sustained losses in designated counties can begin applying for assistance by registering online at
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8ce99fe7f7f85d33189bce28b9f6e60867b1ffda734665d376122f6538e7b9f78561847c50cc6155b8eec77921349387d
DisasterAssistance.gov or by calling 1-800-621-FEMA (3362) or 1-800-462-7585 (TTY) for the hearing and speech impaired. The toll-free telephone numbers will operate from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. (local time) seven days a week until further notice.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and members of the Cabinet pray prior to their Cabinet meeting | August 9, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump led a moment of silence at the White House in remembrance of those lost on September 11, 2001.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8619bf0e0a47a29775e018df0c63e43cd373a0e5d16c0f8261515cb16eff254444c887dce90183ebd0d036c2e7a062667
Watch the moment of silence .
The President and the First Lady then participated in a 9/11 observance at the Pentagon.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c8a38e3fbddf98dd289b817674890ebb958d5890d5f83eb1d0c53c8914ac4460e3be4a16f93abde4336ecb82f18c039e57
Watch the remembrance ceremony .
Later, the President will receive his daily intelligence briefing and receive an update on Hurricane Irma.

Vice President Mike Pence is in Shanksville, Pennsylvania, to commemorate the 16th anniversary of September 11 at the Flight 93 National Memorial. The Vice President will deliver remarks, tour the Flight 93 National Memorial Visitors Center, and participate in a wreath laying ceremony with the friends and family of the fallen.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c883bfb5c3bca2e0747d6a86c0a13ff8f7690315219aa009d74471edc5f1ac60fd6f149796d08854f62e8c2a74caee6118
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e4f1ac22d42126c802e9b4852a104b6b5c0d61fab74af9d0697f13380e9435b74ea5ba73ad77d9e8612a1969fe722a70c1384b918c0af1e4
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4d8bcb1123e5f3a322ad758dcfe68fbbad6f5faad15f3c50d172d650ed2c6ba8c2fe7d75654a3576a4d8c13e160428590
Unsubscribe

Hurricane Irma Update President Trump, Vice President Pence, and members of the Cabinet received a briefing yesterday from Acting Homeland Security Secretary Elaine Duke, Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) Administrator Brock Long, and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert on the ongoing Federal response and recovery operations for Hurricane Irma. They also discussed Federal support for Hurricane Harvey recovery, which is still in the early stages. President Trump stressed that his top priorities are life-saving and life-sustaining efforts in affected areas. The President is in regular contact with Governors currently in the path of Hurricane Irma, as well as Governors of the States and territories already impacted by the storm. He continues to extend his thoughts and prayers to those affected, while recognizing the many volunteer and faith-based organizations dedicating their time and efforts to help their fellow Americans. Read more President Trump Approves Additional Disaster Declarations Yesterday, President Trump amended the U.S. Virgin Islands Disaster Declaration and authorized an increase in the level of Federal funding for debris removal and emergency protective measures undertaken as a result of Hurricane Irma. The President also declared that a major disaster exists in the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico and the State of Florida, and ordered Federal aid to supplement recovery efforts. FEMA Resources Residents and business owners who sustained losses in designated counties can begin applying for assistance by registering online at DisasterAssistance.gov or by calling 1-800-621-FEMA (3362) or 1-800-462-7585 (TTY) for the hearing and speech impaired. The toll-free telephone numbers will operate from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. (local time) seven days a week until further notice. Photo of the Day President Donald J. Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and members of the Cabinet pray prior to their Cabinet meeting | August 9, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead) POTUS and VP TODAY Today, President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump led a moment of silence at the White House in remembrance of those lost on September 11, 2001. Watch the moment of silence . The President and the First Lady then participated in a 9/11 observance at the Pentagon. Watch the remembrance ceremony . Later, the President will receive his daily intelligence briefing and receive an update on Hurricane Irma. Vice President Mike Pence is in Shanksville, Pennsylvania, to commemorate the 16th anniversary of September 11 at the Flight 93 National Memorial. The Vice President will deliver remarks, tour the Flight 93 National Memorial Visitors Center, and participate in a wreath laying ceremony with the friends and family of the fallen.

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Thank you for joining!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I wanted to send you a quick thank you myself before things get too crazy. As the campaign gets going, I’ll make sure to.....
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonDK7ELXtoA7Ma1YNb9Xq90pvw0kloB_NjNBxon-IDutuiAQZJQ0APGOThdbWIS6YHyY-YJYszG4Hs4pV_k3nL9CDCJH6t52HB3Ea04BUtB5iGiB_qOQmBrfQGlQyLvwZcAWDOPwvKoByN66WtI_w01CUEz3rY8efGPQQ9js8cewc2hS7hY9Qiarvikt8Pcor7H-NgPQS52IySdVuOyOmb9yn0lYJPXLEGeBcRH8HuVk0JNmFa_t95YFbcqiLagLAJPILnfsWBnwVo5SDhS0GuWTpzbipY680fIvyCwvlLUKzh9xRuHPsgOhvgKEKCc50QPtIM8O6DnDX3XZqC7y8Lt496nAvbI3rWsbggRorCJnUQ4pi4K8jhpdFqRvxddIsWA%3D%3D)

Friend, thank you for joining!

I wanted to send you a quick thank you myself before things get too crazy.

As the campaign gets going, I’ll make sure to keep you updated on all of the important news in the fight to bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington.

In the meantime, you can make sure you stay in touch by following me on [**Twitter**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonH15SdREcoOyA4pWhHS_GKxPEF5YajX5DX1o95gbDjdZE3V_4C7DFQUQi-C1ZlSflZR9Ti_5bExMtv8-9c1P7fHRF5pzLHOgE69DSv55IrPmV8ebjzRhKJM4djf1hAY3QU_AY7_YEr06wmVj813vhLcIUhwQET_kaDSztz_dcAWrhwY35lTsXmde6jyJqM6zbHP5d3jOapeq032Onwlc8axxfT553Yr01qOYPeaU9I7QB-KW4YfSeUQnEjQe4d9JTA%3D%3D), liking my page on [**Facebook**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonLarZeY-aoucWPjfO7HbR0jZpLn1TYhfc44Ew2wsoPfkhBQblGN-mchGnO9eqm4nlu7bwMjTCH6RXQLoYI6uAG71orsIKXXbEukuAN0d_LldZuxo3A_cvvRAh-DTUsRftlCsjPh8r3Ceg8U5NDJQaBkk-Li77eFYgEoTIidhR7al0yaO6fdbMwvHUdRTwVccO57w1JWJsC0Yk0rC87lNJuVjZaMnB17VldYLE5p6pxeVVwb2flZRrDQdG-JBMjECrg%3D%3D) and checking out my [**Instagram**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonC5cJkwwOqUpp_AXc3KC_WEmSUugdWBItgLWDAk-EpHH701fFsyTxhBwImK0aTvUFgCkrsdfci6HDUDhtudP0zcMFRG8V8FTIr03yL6caV0RTNB5GUde71AVnOSYJOfCgtsPgN7-yVjRdwPAU5eIsbSmYInWfXHX0D-s9CxlCXpE2hEL94Jd4tHHJ0NahVKkXNebwzSWlvoKEI_rAYCsP9XjOPAgxRv3aGzMn18ClYrXJruc7tXPs6ajLxUofSuKDw%3D%3D) account.

Thank you again for your support, Friend. Let’s change Washington together!

Leah Vukmir
[DONATE](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonDK7ELXtoA7Ma1YNb9Xq90pvw0kloB_NjNBxon-IDutuiAQZJQ0APGOThdbWIS6YHyY-YJYszG4Hs4pV_k3nL9CDCJH6t52HB3Ea04BUtB5iGiB_qOQmBrfQGlQyLvwZcAWDOPwvKoByN66WtI_w01DgDu9TIn3cyGK4IqwaozejHqk9adGy5XW79M-lsNIOAZbKclUt-xQfyeUDqATmFryxRXTr3uJulcKajLyrdnZJUgo9UmToV7JIAuMvtlwvwP7CUJKyUsMPB4GjdgUtBRZzPgFWrGnIt8RQOVIGl__BOoRoXETZ3DoQhQs4q3jqksj93kPJnAq6yZcnKdQwKKeeoaNXgWGZqQIhuCmIov9r4LpLvKPQ4yOr4h93hVJMCw%3D%3D)
---

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonLarZeY-aoucWPjfO7HbR0jZpLn1TYhfc44Ew2wsoPfksx2LNwaycBLr6dXmcP49zuf8R0Ip13UYA0XpVWMdz_QuAMDiEsiuDHy2J_KlMtO2e8Des_ioSORL--0BRhIe12k-K7jKCvh5o19YAugjcKrqn44t8ZtQlUaCqYec0KSzyRAMC9ypJY4OdwwEj7GAg6Sy_Z_u0DfyHeHeMMxuDpCLJIhTE1kFsXIEPzKtYcvtXZMmi6-zhqoq0_g83J-yAA%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonH15SdREcoOyA4pWhHS_GKxPEF5YajX5DX1o95gbDjdZtpJfSHOibpjdnyHGtEDBYg390Gq5C4K3VSSskejK-PAUTG-Xpu5ApCx1Iw6kXWQBkQrw0whUBY8Vypqu09qEk8I8_2XDJAXMOMg8Msr_wrLI1NHpD52Y0LUwl97_TUhciO6THbUETqvvf5VKhszLTIZyuW-wgw5fiPtfq43S1lugFmpLfwoQ0r-lFKv0UPm-6Mm2wyujqBv8X9bb-q5NUQ%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=V0SMkwAGMbdVNJ-OCaDbx-RjBQQu39fXDOhFLb5T6-lOq1hbUOBaZFNLzoh8z8gmihITig-LmpJ9uPX9ohuLHjfdtGwxVf0irsKQH68mNT5Mkl_A1h1WMiJdxF0GHubWqMAa8yqcLAz9GaaBTPI1ischfZYZQs9WQu-lUEawjrKvY2BA8IkMRNFSruoXiAte7fYF678DxtTPdHqrw1hA2LnCfo3ptGBxvqElgZVjff84ZkAOoj5YeUApuvM6G3LD). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonD6WkRAp9BZkmbLLhBeZB0_tfiBBfAmshnZ1KRP3IVABhLO88F-oFg1A1FnOq2sVfV79QvgCKfAg1iNJn05WwwDUONo4S-ZA1oVNOFp7JqC1L4Fv2VyCrqmwINIe9A16uy4HDPUTtccZz9nqHv-w-fuLk5QMZeHdSLy0arPRl280t1ifb1qu87xlHoufUjZSFt6VT6nQykBAPB8R3-9Yo5jB7ton4u3BacamtI6w7i7vwl9tuLmLXQ2r8OQ-45EGxn6BFc3MmfsgCXyWjBFb2RiQ46ecMr7MxCwobTw3MLwx_1xXI0tUNRyM9ZK1wI7gt8gC_s01RdQGUVajCP6xMW6wunwzgbsTU2aCu0BkmXsV) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonD6WkRAp9BZkmbLLhBeZB0_zjRFv9zhVTfxANx0m8hXO08N8LXkIeV3e9BevS9d-PmF0eOKQ4tJeRDxZRGeNul6TZwKNLBRBXZwyc7ySX_r4Fe2XAvTSQd-F7NReokiR_oICQhCA_q6zAn2I7s-0_7y8vP-f5l-FJTM8SOzequYatbSlhMNactWjG7vr5quDK1uRkKkDs-jC2F2fBg01pHjF2uPXK3HUYarB_0-D9XcCTeNvm6lQ1YWYpQ-4NjMYG_WCfYXfDu8w73WGD2M1P13NjYUJ8ovFaQruLcaZiNomvvn5bwwxcCf8Y_AP-q0ApPD-KK1egeJ2fCgtKV4k0Gfqpb5teZzW1gtqve5gJpiJ) to help me take the Wisconsin Way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonLarZeY-aoucWPjfO7HbR0jZpLn1TYhfc44Ew2wsoPfk_94INONs0qMqjE9zv0q5gRzvEH2wkCScF9F9b-88x8crxMmeP9DqAIl-PXzC5wYOKYx4hvimSKNDAUnkF6ab3vPku7JgaS3nWqdkrCh0iC8XmNx-EI2gkGTJq782D_qWYAqysGuSRDOwzlxyS3o5lMLoUkeTKonzmPDt1mfrhDHLUzCLDe0znOVmutnN3lR5ipXE4wDDHWErMaqyWfF_Ww%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonH15SdREcoOyA4pWhHS_GKxPEF5YajX5DX1o95gbDjdZGd0gxza_qVk6njm_0sn0Rhtpv16dfvHmTZTw-C5sdz4eiizVP1ivtLnZG3S6UBGjNnTed1ddRRDU68n3HT2ILdqgJ6EQc-NEflY7N8Ali-JKWE8o9C6kMI-kQz3mbeRjYZM-c_iIR2wvp7keJHgy9drDRtEgVaFuKhrwbhpu2eeidtlioD6-v4MT5NgQxIzdLQB_jgzKcDWELf8qBNdSdQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonC5cJkwwOqUpp_AXc3KC_WEmSUugdWBItgLWDAk-EpHHGzAlqYpl7ZCg2FmitueJLqMlTKwCgU9IiqEqPVxLcHfj_TAvbFs55U5OU653ucxwNfgfQ20PMRWSUP_FMrx60K3-k5LKab8k6GfaVk7foTGbmSrb7q-WdXrIJkuQGcVg7AbkLhjPEEGoLTnDkhg2eE42O9Z0UbLDXHNUAfHVVbcgvFfhWGUVBDCyV9dR_217IF-ysaI_2GcLjFCWFKZvwQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=PSOrTkRx4zAIE4F6NRmonD6WkRAp9BZkmbLLhBeZB099SkPX5oqQoIa0fwqpa86RokiCrBSMFe6hP7Oj8oNjrZxZ7LLOe9s7RFn3ndWCIY_bdDFcpF_9sC5IZZ4jZzECNeCVvxzggqpD6h6kdVPMFdA6-HYLjs9tBoI76fIQF2ew1RAJF4rHu6sJjwoDVQBFAuDq6JtjNiAihRWTH01UNhmwJ7W8Bdo6zCJOHNYhn8NpASUVD0qQhJf9_unBCzlmZ0Wy2InWwBN-rs7wHa0yHslADKq2feuooqvRw3HNWem0VyA8W3qrEcvjFVV8iEQNrXWVco7pZ0ahcVmN83Cz0uSg8Bm1DzbVV5FdFgeRbTMFleIWdguy5FK9FDuMgTDifVxdortvpfCWqHLQf6o6-g%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=V0SMkwAGMbdVNJ-OCaDbx-RjBQQu39fXDOhFLb5T6-lOq1hbUOBaZFNLzoh8z8gmihITig-LmpJ9uPX9ohuLHjfdtGwxVf0irsKQH68mNT5Mkl_A1h1WMiJdxF0GHubWqMAa8yqcLAz9GaaBTPI1ischfZYZQs9WQu-lUEawjrKvY2BA8IkMRNFSruoXiAte7fYF678DxtTPdHqrw1hA2LnCfo3ptGBxvqElgZVjff84ZkAOoj5YeUApuvM6G3LD) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=77425b4c4ed446c6b3ff3261a76ac9e8&_e=V0SMkwAGMbdVNJ-OCaDbx-RjBQQu39fXDOhFLb5T6-lOq1hbUOBaZFNLzoh8z8gmihITig-LmpJ9uPX9ohuLHjfdtGwxVf0irsKQH68mNT5Mkl_A1h1WMiJdxF0GHubWqMAa8yqcLAz9GaaBTPI1ischfZYZQs9WQu-lUEawjrKvY2BA8IkMRNFSruoXiAte7fYF678DxtTPdHqrw1hA2LnCfo3ptGBxvqElgZVjff84ZkAOoj5YeUApuvM6G3LD) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: I wanted to send you a quick thank you myself before things get too crazy. As the campaign gets going, I’ll make sure to..... Friend, thank you for joining! I wanted to send you a quick thank you myself before things get too crazy. As the campaign gets going, I’ll make sure to keep you updated on all of the important news in the fight to bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. In the meantime, you can make sure you stay in touch by following me on , liking my page on and checking out my account. Thank you again for your support, Friend. Let’s change Washington together! Leah Vukmir Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
On 9/11/2001, first responders climbed 110 flights of stairs to rescue their fellow Americans. Each year, people around the country join together to remember their heroism--and climb 110 flights in full gear. I was proud to join a 9/11 memorial event yesterday to honor their sacrifice.
Peter,
On 9/11/2001, first responders climbed 110 flights of stairs to rescue their fellow Americans. Each year, people around the country join together to remember their heroism--and climb 110 flights in full gear. I was proud to join a 9/11 memorial event yesterday to honor their sacrifice.

[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=205d9a67af&e=84041254e6)
After 9/11 many people said that we would, "Never forget, always remember." That's easy to say, and hard to do. To remember well requires hard work. Today, sixteen years later, most children have no memory of September 11th. That day, hundreds of first responders gave their lives. It's fitting and proper for us to do our part and to sweat, work, and sacrifice to keep that memory alive.

[Watch our tribute to 9/11 first responders here.](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e5d4f428ef&e=84041254e6)

In their memory,
Eric
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=eed62afd1a&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f4dc495a06&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=5121ac1f7f).

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Senator Schumer says end the commission
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

The sham Trump-Pence election commission is meeting tomorrow in New
Hampshire, and already LegitAction members throughout the country have
stepped up to sign our petition and say:

Congressional Democrats must heed Senator Chuck Schumer’s call to end
this commission whose only intention is to disenfranchise voters.

Many Democrats see the commission for what it is, but many still
don’t, like New Hampshire Secretary of State Bill Gardner. Gardner
continues to serve on the commission and is even hosting tomorrow’s
meeting -- despite the obvious danger we know the commission poses.

We need to deprive this illegitimate commission of its bipartisan
sheen, and that means getting more members of Congress behind ending
it.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dems_2/?t=1002&akid=260%2E356062%2EV4j6C1 ]Add your name to the petition today. Demand congressional Democrats
work to end the sham election commission now.

Tomorrow’s meeting will be only the second time this commission has
convened. It’s still getting started, and there’s still time to nip it
in the bud.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy now,

Russ Feingold

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dems_2/?t=1003&akid=260%2E356062%2EV4j6C1 ]TAKE ACTION »

Authorized and paid for by LegitAction, Inc.

All content © 2017 LegitAction, Inc., All Rights Reserved

LegitAction, Inc
PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Public servants' sacrifice
body:
Sixteen years ago today our country was attacked by enemies of liberty and justice.
#
Friends,
Sixteen years ago today our country was attacked by enemies of liberty and justice. Our Revolution recognizes the lives lost and immense pain felt by thousands of family members across the country over the loss of their loved ones. During this reflective moment we also recognize the sacrifices made by countless law enforcement officers, firefighters, emergency service providers, and countless others who answered the call to help their neighbors on September 11, 2001. Many heroes gave their lives on Tuesday, September 11 to save and rescue others, and many are living today with injuries they suffered that day.
We also honor the lives of the men and women who serve in our military and vow that we will never again send them to die or face permanent injury in a senseless war.
Today, our country and our allied nations face the threat of terrorism at the hands of al-Qaeda, ISIS, Boko Haram, and other terrorist groups.
As we face this pivotal juncture in our nation's history, we must protect America, embrace our commitments to defend freedom and support human rights, and be relentless in combatting terrorists who will do us harm.
Now more than ever, we must engage in a foreign policy that goes beyond deciding how to react to conflict around the world. Working proactively to prevent international conflict and protect all human lives, regardless of race, religion, or nationality is one of the greatest needs of our time.
As we face an increasingly challenging geopolitical landscape, it is imperative that we live with greater love and respect for one another as human beings. I look forward to our continued work to securing a future with greater freedom and prosperity for all.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af58/bed43eb/49de7c9/75ffb250/3194185718/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af58/bed43eb/49de7c9/75ffb253/3194185718/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af58/bed43eb/49de7c9/75ffb252/3194185718/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Team Ryan
subject: United we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

In an instant, everything changed.

For the families who lost loved ones. For the first responders who risked it all. For every American who will never forget.

Everything changed 16 years ago. And to this day, we stand united in remembrance.

Years will pass and memories will fade; but we must never forget that, as Americans, we are always united.

God bless America,

Team Ryan

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=30554007&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTMzODc4OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: Team Maggie
subject: Help those impacted by Irma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde06/2a380d31/1cc0836f/fe7676/2445546363/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde06/2a380d31/1cc0836f/fe7676/2445546363/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Over the weekend, Hurricane Irma, the second hurricane to ravage our country in a few short weeks, made landfall in Florida and triggered evacuation orders for 5.6 million people.
As many as 6.5 million Floridians have been without power, and the National Weather Service reported that flooding from a Jacksonville storm surge shattered the record set by 1964's Hurricane Dora.
Relief organizations are hard at work but with Alabama, Tennessee, South Carolina, North Carolina, and Georgia all expected to feel Irma's impact, your help is needed too.
**NPR has compiled a list of ways you can donate money, time, and other services.[Take a look and if you're able, please help out however you can.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde06/2a380d31/1cc0836f/fe7677/2445546363/VEsF/ "http://www.npr.org/sections/thetwo-way/2017/09/10/549910104/ways-to-help-as-florida-is-dealt-catastrophic-blow-from-irma")**
We're so grateful for all of the members of this community who did what they could to help with Harvey relief efforts -- thank you.
And if you've already stepped up to assist those impacted by Irma, thank you for that too.
Lastly and as always, thank you to our first responders for doing everything they can to keep us safe.
-- All of us on Team Maggie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde06/2a380d31/1cc0836f/fe7670/2445546363/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**
